title: Demographic Segmentation: Definition, How-To, Examples
snippet: Benefits: Surveys allow you to collect specific data tailored to your business needs. Appinio, for instance, offers customizable survey options that enable you to target particular demographics and receive real-time results. Understanding your audience is the cornerstone of effective demographic segmentation.

title: How to Find (Not Guess) Your Target Audience: A Data-Driven Approach
snippet: Here's a simple way to think about it: Target market = WHERE you sell (industries, company types) Target audience = WHO you sell and talk to (people with defined roles) A single target market can contain multiple target audiences. A software company selling to healthcare might target IT directors with technical messages about implementation while also targeting CFOs with ROI-focused content ...

title: Target Audience Identification and Segmentation in Digital Marketing
snippet: Effectively segmenting your target audience for digital marketing considers four key criteria: psychographic, demographic, behavioral, and geographic factors. Depending on which type of segmentation you want to apply, you'll need to delve into the factors like their values, interests, lifestyles, age, income, purchasing habits, etc.

title: Target Market Analysis in 2026 (How to Identify Customers)
snippet: Building clear customer profiles and market segments reveals who you should target, how they make buying decisions, and which channels, price points, and messages will resonate. Competitor research highlights gaps and opportunities in the market, helping you differentiate your offerings and identify underserved customer groups.

title: Audience Segmentation: Types, Examples, Tips - The CMO
snippet: Use audience segmentation to create highly personalized marketing strategies that drive stronger engagement, conversion, and retention.
